Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using busy-waiting.

# Purpose
This header file provides function declarations for implementing precise time delays in C programs. It includes two functions: [`delay_us`](<#delay_us>) and [`delay_ms`](<#delay_ms>). The [`delay_us`](<#delay_us>) function allows for delaying execution at a microsecond granularity, while the [`delay_ms`](<#delay_ms>) function enables delays at a millisecond level. Both functions use busy-waiting to achieve the specified delay durations. The file includes the `<inttypes.h>` header to ensure the use of fixed-width integer types, specifically `uint32_t`, for consistent behavior across different platforms.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `inttypes.h`
